description: Add a sanctioned op that materializes any declared-but-absent block data file — the missing.blocks[] set from findUnmaterializedAssets — into an existing substrate, copying the catalog starter via the install path. Invoked by update for a catalog-added block kind and available standalone as a repair/materialize op; previewed by --dryRun.
acceptance_criteria: A substrate whose config declares a block kind with no data file reports not-installed; the op materializes the block's data file; context-bootstrap-state then reports ready.
The op runs both standalone and on update for a catalog-added block kind; --dryRun previews without writing.
The materialized block is writable: append-block-item --autoId succeeds against it.
